title: Mitigation Playbook Schema
description: Defines the structure for a mitigation playbook in response to a security event or triggered rule.

id.description: Unique identifier for the mitigation playbook.

applies_to.description: Criteria for when this playbook should be considered.

component_types.description: Component types this playbook is relevant for.

processes.description: Plant processes this playbook is relevant for.

rule_ids.description: Specific rule IDs that can trigger this playbook.

steps.description: An ordered list of actions to take.

operator_notes.description: Guidance for the human operator performing the action.

severity_scope.description: The event severities this playbook applies to.

regulatory_refs.description: References to regulatory or compliance standards.
